# barracudawaf_custom_referer_bot (Resource)

`barracudawaf_custom_referer_bot` manages `Custom Referer Bot` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_custom_referer_bot" "test_bot" {
    name = "test_terraform_bot"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **name** (String) Attack Data Type Name
